title: Debug OAuth state mismatch in serve.py

log.context: Debug OAuth state mismatch in serve.py

Done. Here's what was found and fixed:

**Root cause:** The OAuth state (`_oauth_states` dict) is purely in-memory. When `website.service` restarts — even briefly — the dict is wiped. Any in-flight OAuth flow initiated before the restart would have its state lost, causing the "Invalid OAuth state" 403 on callback.

**Fix applied** (`/mnt/data/hello-world/serve.py`, `_handle_github_callback`):
Added a cookie-based fallback. The login handler already sets a `gh_oauth_state` cookie on the browser. ...(truncated)
